name: OpenClaw Cursor Provider
description: Cursor models for OpenClaw via official @cursor/sdk (local runtime, no CLI proxy).

workspaceDir.description: Default cwd for local Cursor agents. Falls back to agents.defaults.workspace.

strictToolLoop.description: Reject Cursor runs that execute built-in tools internally (force OpenClaw harness loop).

chatMode.description: auto = slim chat-only turns without tools; never = always full prompt + tools (legacy).

slimSystemMaxChars.description: Max chars of system prompt in chat-only (slim) turns.

maxHistoryMessages.description: Message history cap for slim prompts.

includeThinkingInPrompt.description: Include [assistant thinking] blocks when building tool-mode prompts.

pricing.description: USD per 1M tokens for OpenClaw billing (calculateCost).
